name: Lowcalorie Marble Chocolate Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Splenda granular low-calorie sweetener with sucralose
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, stir together flour, Splenda, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
2. In a mixing bowl, beat butter, eggs, and vanilla extract for 1 minute. Add apple sauce and beat just until blended.
3. Fold in the flour mixture until moistened.
4. Using 1/3 cup of the batter, drop by spoonfuls into a greased 8-inch square cake pan.
5. Fold cocoa powder into the remaining batter until combined. Gently spoon the batter into the pan, covering and smoothing the white batter.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (180°C) for 15 minutes or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Transfer to a rack and let cool.
Per serving:
About 65 calories, 2 g Protein, 4 g fat, 7 g carbohydrate
